title: 目標達成の後に・ド根性！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"No matter how many times Haru Urara loses, she
never gives up!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been hearing more and more people praise
Haru Urara for her tenacity.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Winning is so hard! Everyone whooshed right
past me!
choice_data_list: What do you think is the key to winning?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Um, well...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I should enter a race where it's only
me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Then there's no way to lose!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? I thought I struck gold for a second
there.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Ah, is that Haru Urara? Hey there!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who said my name?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: You've been trying so hard! I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: Hey! It's that plucky Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! You know who I am?

text_block_list.name: Passerby D
text_block_list.text: Of course! We're in your fan club!

text_block_list.name: Passerby E
text_block_list.text:
I love that you keep going no matter how many
times you lose! Don't ever give up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! Yeah! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I feel like an idol! I'm glad I've worked so
hard!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone is so excited to see me race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna race even more! Then they'll really be excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's motivation skyrockets! It was a good
idea for her to enter races to gain experience and
grow her fanbase.
choice_data_list:
Let's keep up the great work and enter more
races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps by having her enter races, Haru Urara will find a race to aspire to... Once she finds that dream race, I'll do whatever I can to help her reach it and win!
